name: Run manager floor walk
description: Run a timed manager walk during critical windows to catch developing pressure, coach live execution, and trigger escalation before the floor drifts into unmanaged chaos.
source_ref: core-v2: leadership rhythm should place attention where risk is building, not where it is comfortable
entry_conditions: Managers disappear into admin or static positions while service risk builds on the floor.
The venue has clear peak windows where visible management attention changes outcomes.
contraindications: Do not turn the floor walk into passive observation with no intervention logic.
Do not schedule the walk if the manager has no authority to coach or escalate live issues.
proof_of_completion: Managers have a timed floor walk cadence for critical windows.
The walk includes observation targets, coaching prompts, and escalation checks.
At least one real service shows the manager redirecting attention based on the walk.
